exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-03-24 60kg × 9 reps — hold weight, focus on controlled ROM (no elbow flare) and 3-1-2 tempo. Provides ~4 sets indirect front delt stimulus.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Underhand Tricep Extension
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 7.5kg × 10 reps — increase to 8kg. Shoulder-safe unilateral tricep isolation.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 5kg × 10 reps — increase to 5.5kg. Contributes to rear delt MEV (6 sets total this week) and balances front delt indirect stimulus from bench.

notes: Week 1 introduction — all muscles at MEV. Perform shoulder rehab warm-up (band external rotations 2×15/arm, band pull-aparts 2×15) before starting. Bench press: controlled ROM, 3-1-2 tempo, mind-muscle connection on chest squeeze. Stop 3–4 reps from failure (RPE 7). No overhead pressing due to active rotator cuff tear. Nutrition: 2800 kcal, 155g protein supports hypertrophy volume build.
